reviews_data.review_text: Love this place and every other location I’ve visited fresh refreshing and consistent.
I love the dubai bowl. I wish there was a kids bowl option
Their bowls always taste super fresh and are consistent every time. Love this place!
Overall great, worked quickly and efficient and greeted each customer with a lovely attitude
I loveee palm berries! Discovered their Cornelius location because of work and have been hooked ever since! An açaí from any of their locations hate to see me coming 🤣, defff recommend!
Absolutely DELISH!
Great place
Best Palm berries from all locations everything good about it specially the people work there
Adorable sitting area and an outdoor patio.  Great healthy food!

Overall the product is good. Unfortunately, the consistency changes depending who's making the shake. However, the rewards program compared to your mainstream competition is subpar at best customer loyalty wins all the time. I would recommend reaching out to your corporate and seeing if you can modify your rewards program which clearly would take. I'm not sure 40 drinks to get anything of value. It's almost pointless. Look at your competition. Adjust accordingly or they will eat your lunch
Always so delicious and friendly!

I was in a huge rush and the Mooresville store usually gets me in and out but the Cornelius store was so slow! #1the girl making stuff in the back was out front talking about her personal life to a friend. The poor girl at the register was getting people walking in and couldn't make orders in back. I stood there for 20 mins! I wouldn't have stopped here and got anything I would have went on to work but now I'm going to be late.
Best smoothies in the area by far. Don’t waste your time and money on other places this is the best
My all time fav place. I eat here everyday!! Palm bowls are my fav!
It’s always great to go to palm berries.  Great food and service is ALWAYS!
Love the açaí bowls.

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Protein Bowl, Sunset Bowl, Pink Base

reviews_data.review_text: I’ve been here numerous times over the past couple months and service and food is great each time! Just went in tonight before they closed and my Dubai Chocolate Bowl was fantastic! I received the same quality customer service even though they were closing soon. Very satisfied and I highly recommend this place.
Love everything about Palm Berries!
Wonderful food and service! Definitely will be back.
Great place and yummy smoothies, just kinda pricey
Always love Palm Berries on our drive up I-77. Stopped at the Catawba exit this time. It’s the more bougie location… but just as good as always!!

review_questions.Group size: 2 people, Suitable for all group sizes
review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews_data.review_text: Acai bowl. Delicious & fresh. Nice service gals! Clean space.

Greedy. I placed my order that I always placed and this location specially didn't even make it instead when I walked in I was told I needed to pay an upcharged for my order like be for real. My first and last time at this location .
Best one I've ever had!
Delicious Fall menu!
Excellent experience all the way around.
Best smoothies ever. Custom bled available to get desired taste. Bowls delicious! Staff always friendly and courteous. Convenient location.
The worker here Jed is very awesome and he was very nice and respectful. He deserves a raise.
They are great! I come here a lot. I’m completely deaf and they are extremely nice on helping me get everything I need. And the smoothies are awesome!
Awesome place, food always comes out quick
Poor customer service
Best açaí bowls around. We get açaí bowls here every weekend and they’re 11/10 every single time.
It’s my go too for a meal replacement everyone is friendly and fast
Everyone is always friendly and helpful with suggestions. Service is quick and great

review_questions.Seating type: Outdoor patio / terrace, Private dining room

reviews_data.review_text: Me encantaaaa este lugar
So delicious
Friendly service and excellent açaí bowl
Madison was amazing with my big obnoxious order! She was very patient and definitely customer oriented.
Amazing bowls. The variety of base flavors sets it apart from others.
The bowls are so delicious.
So delicious! Lovely customer service :)
My favorite place for a healthy treat!
I’m super picky about my Açaí bowls but Palm Berries is amazing. The customization is super easy and the prices are unbeatable honestly. I come here every week

You cannot beat Palm Berries. It is consistently amazing and so is their customer service. We have had many bowls from other places and cities and this is by far our favorite. Everything is so fresh and delicious. I am absolutely obsessed with their protein bowl. The staff are very knowledgeable about their product and can really guide you in deciding if you need help. 10/10!

The smoothies and smoothie bowls here are really good. The employees are very friendly and helpful. The ambience is super cute. The only issue is the açaí is prepackaged with sugar and the nutritional menu doesn’t specify how much of the sugar is added. The employees themselves don’t add sugar. The protein and peanut butter has artificial ingredients. The oil of course is either sunflower or vegetable oil. I still enjoy it as a once a week treat instead of ice cream which is way worse. But I wish they had cleaner ingredients. Other than that, I love this place. I recommend the build your own bowl with the pure açaí base. So good.
Our favorite place to get Bowls
I am always happy with my visits to Palm Berry.  The bowls and smoothies are delicious.  It is one of my more favorite places to stop!
Clean atmosphere!!! Great service!!! Delicious bowls and smoothies!!
Alwayz delicious
Great place
Our favorite place in the world to eat Acai bowl. We recommend this place to everyone
Delicious!
Delicious
Love, love the protein bowl.

Easily one of the best acai bowls I’ve tasted in NC. Service is outstanding, ingredients are fresh, bowls taste amazing! I live about 30 mins away from this location but it’s seriously worth the drive.
Best Açaí Bowl in the LKN area!!
Love the “employee bowls”, always a treat to come to Palm Barries
Was so good I almost busted. Love y’all down
I love this place! It’s the perfect spot to relax and the bowls are delicious! I would definitely recommend going here.
Very polite service.  Great bowl

The employees are always so kind and welcoming. They always have a smile on their face and greet me so politely. My order is always right and ready when I pickup! Their location is also pretty as it’s decorated really nicely. 10/10 recommended.
I just love the fruit bowls ! Gives me the healthy treat I am looking for
Perfect every time!  Love this place and so glad this store opened near me!
Always awesome!!
Always clean space, friendly staff. Quick easy most of all delicious!
It has a very relaxing atmosphere and the bowls are just wonderful.  I love going to this place.
Delicious! Healthy! Friendly! Y’all need to come through and try it! It’s where the old Starbucks used to be!
So this place is a MEAL!  The snack size is almost more than I can eat, and it’s sooooooo good. Very thick and protein heavy.  Highly recommend!

Perfect Acai bowls every single time! Kudos Palm Berries Cornelius! I have never tasted a better bowl with the best and freshest ingredients, EVER! Excellent service and super quick too! Simply the best!!
The best açaí bowls in the area!!!!
Cute place to hang out. Clean & delicious bowls
Delicious! High quality ingredients.
I’ve been coming to palm berries since last year and for the price, it’s very worth it. Great customer service and efficient timing with the food. 10/10
Love the healthy choices! Fresh and delicious
Please add delivery to the Cornelius location.
Delici
Get the protein bowl & thank me later. Drooling since the first bite. Oh, and add goji berries. Huge antioxidant boost.
Great smoothie bowl. Did build your own and got exactly what I would want!
No doubt the best açai bowl I’ve ever had! The interior is so aesthetically pleasing and the seating is perfect to hang and enjoy a nice, fresh bowl.
beautiful location - the inside is so clean & aesthetic. staff was so friendly & accommodating. and the acai bowl was soo good. can’t recommend this place enough!
Amazing staff! Everyone is so friendly and helpful. And they have AMAZING bowls and smoothies!!!
Loved the food and the service was awesome! Employees very kind and exceptional quality bowls !

If i could I would rate this place a 10/10. The owner was so friendly and actually cared about his employees and his customers. The service was friendly and fast! The way most places are these days, you really don’t expect top notch! But I was impressed. Highly recommend. Great sweets, great staff, clean and welcoming environment.
Great service and the freshest ingredients! I love this place and it has such a great atmosphere!!! If I could rate more than 5 stars I would!
LOVED!
Amazing atmosphere and even better bowls!! 10/10 would recommend

Easily the best açaí I’ve had. The store is beautifully decorated and clean plus the atmosphere is welcoming and vibrant. Definitely recommend the smoothies, perfectly blended which is something that’s important to me.

Absolutely blown away by Palm Berries Cornelius! From the moment you step in, you're greeted with an atmosphere that's both vibrant and cozy. The service is impeccable, with staff who genuinely care about your experience.

Now, let's talk about the food. Each dish is a masterpiece, showcasing the freshest ingredients and innovative flavors that dance on your palate. They use the freshest ingredients and the taste shows it.

And let's not forget about the drinks! Their smoothies, are crafted with precision, offering a delightful blend of flavors that complement the food perfectly.

In summary, Palm Berries Cornelius is a culinary gem that deserves all the praise it gets. Don't walk, run to experience this foodie paradise!
If you’re looking for an amazing atmosphere and even better açaí bowls, this is the place to go! 10/10!
Delicious bowls! Highly recommend!
Best Acai bowls in NC!

As someone who has a dairy sensitivity, I’m constantly looking for alternatives to ice cream, especially ones that are healthy. Açaí bowls are where it’s at, and Palm Berries is TOP NOTCH! The space is clean, the staff is friendly, and it’s an overall great experience! Plus my kids love it too, so it’s wins across the board! Highly recommend
Love Palm Berries, this is a kickass chain, can’t get enough of the pure!
Had an absolute wonderful experience my first time visiting. I got the Queen City bowl and it was delicious. Great service and the ambience is just right for anytime of day !!
Best bowls in clt!!
